activities.name: Sluggish recently
activities.description: But good to get out there even for a short one.

activities.name: The Beautiful SVT with Expect Delays
activities.description: Longest run in a year! Felt good.

activities.name: Doggy joggy and ballot droppy
activities.description: So many squirrels to strain towards

activities.name: November Calibration Tangle
activities.description: Linear improvement seems to continue! I took another 50s off, which is surprising. And heartening.

activities.name: Little leg stretcher in the rain
Pushing it under heavy rain
activities.description: Tough one.

activities.name: Expect Delays: Peak Fall in the City
activities.description: Glorious around the lake and neighborhood.

activities.name: Little bit of Little Si with Little Bean and Chris
activities.description: And a lot of Apple Crostada afterwards

activities.name: To the gym for a little strength and sauna
activities.description: Another pretty morning at Green Lake. 30s pickups along the way.

activities.name: Flat runs are never easy
activities.description: Not sure why but I always do better on rolling hills than flats. This was tough.

activities.name: Track time for David
activities.description: Didn’t have any buddies along this time so  some 800s became 400s and 200s. So be it.

activities.name: A billion leaves in Bridle Trails
activities.description: But no mud, so I got off easy.

activities.name: Treadmill intervals
activities.description:
4 minute intervals, like Steve taught me.
Pace increasing from 10:30 to 8:30
The danger of a planned 3 mile run that comes close to your house after 1.

activities.name: Dramatically better
activities.description: Than recent runs… strangely the only difference was that I did 3 mins of floppy fascia exercises beforehand… it must have lengthened my stride a little. Intriguing.

activities.name: 5 good Kenwood Hills
activities.description: Slight mid to laps 4 and 5: instead of taking a break at the bottom, I took one half way up.

activities.name: Billy Bonks in Fremont
activities.description: This is perhaps what happens when you wake at 5, and have 1/2 a bowl of granola then go back to sleep for 2 hours, then eat nothing more

activities.name: Billy Bonker jogs home
activities.description: Cut my 5 mile short in Fremont and walked up the hill before this little effort

activities.name: Easy trail miles with Bean testing new shoes
activities.description: 3 with Miss B; 2 without. All deliciously flat!

activities.name: Expect Sogginess
activities.description: Great crew makes up for lousy weather

activities.name: Short but spicy at the end
activities.description: Was able to run the last mile at a little below 8:30, which felt good

activities.name: Visiting Liz in HMB
activities.description: Coastal Trail and Half Moon Bay Golf Cart trails. Pretty glorious

activities.name: Checking out the golfers at the Ritz Carlton
Cows and Clifftops at Cowell Ranch
activities.description: Short jog with Bean, who was a bit scared of the cows.

activities.name: Sunshine on the Burke Gilman with Expect Delays
